LanguageData.Ammo_BGM71_HEAT.label: BGM-71D Missile (HEAT)
LanguageData.Ammo_BGM71_HEAT.description: 152mm Anti-tank guided missiles, typically reserved for destroying armoured targets due to its rarity, but can be used for engaging soft targets should a mysterious foreign benefactor supply you with thousands of these free of charge.
LanguageData.Bullet_BGM71_HEAT.label: BGM-71D Missile (HEAT)
